title: geranium suaveolens
intro: Geranium suaveolens, also known as Old Fashioned Cranesbill, is a perennial plant in the geranium family, characterized by its fragrant flowers and heart-shaped leaves. The medicinal properties of Geranium suaveolens lie in its ability to balance hormones and reduce inflammation, making it a popular natural remedy for menstrual issues and menopausal symptoms. The health benefits of this plant include its antispasmodic and anti-anxiety effects, which can help alleviate symptoms of PMS, anxiety, and insomnia. Geranium suaveolens can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or essential oil, and is often used in herbal medicine to promote relaxation, reduce stress, and improve overall well-being.
